de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen

Class ReflectionClassCreator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen.ReflectionClassCreator

  • public class ReflectionClassCreator
extends Object
    Creates the RFL.java file, that provides setter and getter methods using the reflection API as well as object creation functions based on the objenesis library.
    Author:
    mbender, gladisch

    • Field Detail

      • NEW_LINE

        public static final String NEW_LINE
        Constant for the line break which is used by the operating system.

        Do not use \n!

      • createClass

        public StringBuffer createClass(boolean staticClass)
        Creates the RFL.java file, that provides setter and getter methods using the reflection API as well as object creation functions based on the objenesis library.

        Constructors, setter-, getter-methods will be created for the added sorts.

      • ghostMapDecls

        private StringBuffer ghostMapDecls(boolean ghostMapActive)
        Writes a hashmap and a utility method for associating ghost/model fiels with objects.
        Parameters:
        ghostMapActive - becomes are runtime flag that determins if the hashmap should be enabled or not.

      • instanceMethod

        private StringBuffer instanceMethod()
        Returns:
        The method that allows to create new instances

      • staticInitializer

        private StringBuffer staticInitializer(boolean ghostMapActive)

      • instances

        private StringBuffer instances(HashSet<String> sorts)

        sorts -
        Returns:
        All calls to create objects for the given sorts

      • newRef

        private StringBuffer newRef(String sort)
        Returns:
        The call to create an object of given type

      • cleanTypeName

        public static String cleanTypeName(String s)
        Takes a string representing a type e.g. "java.lang.Object[]" and returns a new name without "." and "[]", e.g. "java_lang_Object_ARRAY_". It is used to create correct setter and getter method names. This method is also used in Assignment.toString(boolean rfl) to generate the correct method names.

      • newInstance

        private StringBuffer newInstance(String sort)
        Parameters:
        sort -
        Returns:
        The call to create an object of given type

      • newArray

        private StringBuffer newArray(String sort)
        Parameters:
        sort -
        Returns:
        The call to create an Array of given type

        Returns:
